# Founder Scene

> Founder Scene is a curated event discovery platform for startup founders and entrepreneurs. It aggregates meetups, networking events, and founder gatherings in London, New York, and San Francisco.

Founder Scene collects events from Luma, Eventbrite, Meetup, Startup Grind, Techstars, and other sources. Users can browse upcoming events filtered by city, subscribe to daily or weekly email digests, and submit their own events for review.

The platform is built for founders who want to find relevant in-person events without searching across dozens of platforms.

## Features

- [Homepage](https://founderscene.tech/): Browse all upcoming founder events with city filtering and sorting
- [Event Pages](https://founderscene.tech/sitemap.xml): Individual event detail pages with date, venue, organizer, and registration links
- [Email Digests](https://founderscene.tech/preferences): Subscribe to daily or weekly curated event roundups by city
- [Event Submission](https://founderscene.tech/?submitEvent=true): Submit founder events for community review and publishing

## Cities

- London, UK
- New York, US
- San Francisco, US

## About

Founder Scene is sponsored by [Orbis](https://www.meetorbis.com/), the AI relationship workspace for founders. Orbis helps founders manage their network, enrich contacts, and generate personalized outreach across 1,000+ integrations.

## Optional

- [Unsubscribe](https://founderscene.tech/unsubscribe): Manage email subscription
- [Email Preferences](https://founderscene.tech/preferences): Update digest frequency and city filters
